title: Tensura: Roguelike
description: Turn Tensura: Reincarnated into a Roguelike, where you die, you start over!
body:
------
Full Info. **This datapack is addon for Tensura: Reincarnated mod.** **Installation.** - Put the Datapack in the "minecraft_folder"/saves/"world_name"/datapacks - No need to edit anything. **Every death = Restart** - Start playing as normal. - Upon death reset your race / ability / skill. - When you join the world the first time you can pick your race - If you die after that everything is randomised. **Prestige System. (Checks done through Advancements)** - "Tensura: Reincarnated" added this feature! - As soon as you prestige, everything is reset and you're sent back to spawn. - You can pick your race. - Gain extra Unique unless you are penalised. **Death Penalties** - Right now it uses a scoreboard check "/scoreboard players set #penaltyMax deathPenalty 30" - If player prestiges with deaths over "30" (You can change this number with command above) instead of gaining a Unique Ability remove half deaths instead. - This will be improved even further by doing checks on each life to see playtime, and will only activate if deaths under certian playtime exceed the number above. **Truly Majin!** - This option makes every race you play a Majin one, so there is no "cheesing" hinata. - This feature is always on, but you can turn it off by using "/scoreboard players set .trueMajin gamerules 0" **Compability with Addons that add races!** - Ani's Tensura - - Mysticism - _If you added and then removed one of the following addons for some reason.._ - Make sure to use the following command in order for everything to work properly - /function tr:addon/remove_"addonname" - for now only addon names are anitensura and trmysticism
------
